label: Staking Rewards
description: Track, claim, and sell staking rewards across protocols. Shows reward P&L attribution by source.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. Error boundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx (WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets). requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full] non-empty. availableOn=[defi] non-empty. No any types or @ts-ignore. No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file. Loading state: DeFiDataContext is synchronous; React.Suspense boundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers async; comment added. Empty state: guard added for stakingRewards.length===0. Error state: guard added for nullish stakingRewards/rewardPnl data. No dead code.

1.2.note: — context calls useGlobalScope() and reads organizationIds+strategyIds.

1.3.note: — adjustedStakingRewards memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk (fixed in defi-data-context.tsx).

1.4.note: — clientIds destructured and acknowledged; StakingReward has no clientId field — full client narrowing deferred to BP-5 schema change.

1.5.note: — StakingReward has no strategyId field — strategy narrowing cannot be applied; comment added to adjustedStakingRewards memo with TODO for BP-5.

1.6.note: — empty org arrays return all data (hasDefiDesk=true).

1.7.note: known-gap — MOCK_STAKING_REWARDS and MOCK_REWARD_PNL seed data live in lib/mocks/fixtures/; moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — data exclusively via useDeFiData(). 1.2 pass — context calls useGlobalScope() and reads organizationIds+strategyIds. 1.3 pass — adjustedStakingRewards memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk (fixed in defi-data-context.tsx). 1.4 partial — clientIds destructured and acknowledged; StakingReward has no clientId field — full client narrowing deferred to BP-5 schema change. 1.5 partial — StakingReward has no strategyId field — strategy narrowing cannot be applied; comment added to adjustedStakingRewards memo with TODO for BP-5. 1.6 pass — empty org arrays return all data (hasDefiDesk=true). 1.7 known-gap — MOCK_STAKING_REWARDS and MOCK_REWARD_PNL seed data live in lib/mocks/fixtures/; moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: live ✓ / paper ✓ / batch ✓ — display + claim actions. Claim should be gated in paper mode.

3.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope() but scope.mode not consumed in claim handlers.

3.5.note: Paper mode spec: claim/sell actions should no-op or show warning.

4.1.note: Claim Reward and Claim & Sell buttons have onClick handlers at lines 134, 147.

5.1.note: Target strategies: YIELD_STAKING_SIMPLE, CARRY_RECURSIVE_STAKED — reward claiming and sell flow directly supports staking yield realization.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file. Data via useDeFiData().

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No inline objects in useMemo/useCallback deps.

8.1.note: text-[10px] at lines 57, 61, 65, 82, 128 migrated to text-micro utility backed by --text-micro token (0.625rem) added to globals.css @theme.

8.3.note: TableWidget, KpiStrip, Badge, Button from shared components.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt. Human: keyboard pass required.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred pending --text-label-micro token. 8.5: human resize test required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Staking rewards (claim/sell/rewardPnl) is operationally distinct from staking position entry — separate widget is intentional.

relationships.notes: mergeCandidate with defi-staking considered; kept separate to reduce form widget size.

dataContract.notes: Reward balances should poll every 30s in production. Claim and claim+sell are REST mutations.

gaps.notes: Claim & Sell flow not wired to DEX execution — sell leg is mock-only.

findings.description: Missing empty state: widget rendered stakingRewards.map() with no guard when array is empty.
Missing error state: no nullish data guard before rendering stakingRewards/rewardPnl.
Missing loading state comment: context is synchronous so isLoading is structurally absent; added clarifying comment and noted Suspense boundary in widget-wrapper.tsx.
stakingRewards data was not filtered by org scope — fixed: adjustedStakingRewards memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk.
stakingRewards data not filterable by strategy scope — StakingReward has no strategyId field. Comment and TODO added in context for BP-5 schema change.
clientIds filter not applicable to stakingRewards — StakingReward has no clientId field. clientIds acknowledged in context; narrowing deferred to BP-5.
MOCK_STAKING_REWARDS and MOCK_REWARD_PNL seed data live in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough instead of lib/constants/ or lib/config/. Moving is BP-5 scope.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro Tailwind utility backed by --text-micro token (0.625rem) added to globals.css @theme.

l1FixedBy: defi-data-context.tsx — adjustedStakingRewards memo with hasDefiDesk guard; strategyId and clientId gaps documented with TODO
